title: AuditProofBinding
description: Protocol-owned additive derived evidence sidecar binding one proof-family statement projection to authoritative audit record and seal identities. This object is not the proof artifact itself.

projectedPublicBindings.description: Projected public binding fields used by the selected statement family.

runtime_image_descriptor_digest.description: Digest identity for the signed runtime-image descriptor bound into this proof statement.

attestation_evidence_digest.description: Digest identity for attestation evidence bound into this proof statement.

applied_hardening_posture_digest.description: Digest identity for the applied runtime hardening posture bound into this proof statement.

session_binding_digest.description: Digest identity for the source audited session binding.

project_substrate_snapshot_digest.description: Optional validated project-substrate snapshot identity when the statement family requires verified project context.

attestation_verification_record_digest.description: Optional digest for a trusted attestation verification record identity used by the statement family.

merkleAuthenticationPathStep.description: One ordered Merkle authentication step from leaf toward root.

sibling_digest.description: Digest of the sibling node used for this path step.

sibling_position.description: Sibling branch direction semantics for this path step, including odd-leaf duplication.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for audit proof-binding sidecars.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this proof-binding sidecar.

statement_family.description: Machine-consumed statement-family identifier from the statement_family registry.

statement_version.description: Version identifier for the statement-family contract.

normalization_profile_id.description: Logical normalization profile identifier from the normalization_profile_id registry.

scheme_adapter_id.description: Scheme-adapter identifier from the scheme_adapter_id registry.

audit_record_digest.description: Digest identity of the source signed audit record for this proof-binding sidecar.

audit_segment_seal_digest.description: Digest identity of the signed AuditSegmentSeal envelope anchoring the source record.

merkle_root.description: Authoritative segment Merkle root for the referenced seal.

protocol_bundle_manifest_hash.description: Protocol bundle manifest hash from the verified source audit event context.

binding_commitment.description: Proof-time derived commitment over normalized private witness fields under the selected adapter profile.

projected_public_bindings.description: Projected statement-family public bindings carried in this sidecar.

merkle_path_version.description: Version tag for Merkle authentication-path encoding semantics.

merkle_authentication_path.description: Ordered authentication path from source audit record to authoritative Merkle root.

merkle_path_depth.description: Merkle authentication path depth for bounded witness verification.

leaf_index.description: Leaf index inside the authoritative ordered segment tree used for branch-direction replay.

source_refs.description: Optional additional typed source references required by this statement family.

source_family.description: Typed source family label for this reference.

source_digest.description: Digest identity for the referenced source object.

source_role.description: Typed source-reference role used by this statement family.
